title: can / could / be able to
examples: So English can be good for dating.
So you meant me so you can go to America?
Can you talk a little bit about your students who expand their career?
So even in Korea my Korean is so bad and the only way I've been able to survive is because I'm an English speaker.
I think this is like the most important part of learning English because I think when you focus so much on your mistakes then you can't improve.

title: have to / must
examples: They have to speak to the audience actually a few of the groups that I've taught they're now like in the US in playing at some of the most popular music festivals so that's really awesome to see.

title: If I do / If I did
examples: And I think if you know English it makes traveling and surviving in another country so much easier because chances are that people speak English somewhere there.
